version_note: Extended version: 11 AI/ML concept definitions. Original ProDaBi WS1 uses a food-card paragraph format. This version includes additional AI concepts (TP, FP, sensitivity, MCR, overfitting, karar ağacı) beyond the original ProDaBi scope.
answer_key_source: Worksheet 1.pdf (original) + extended AI terms added for AI-CFT alignment

credit_rules.full: Definition captures that a nesne is an individual entity/instance in the dataset. At least 2 of: varlık (entity), örnek (instance), üzerinde çalışılan (studied), bireysel (individual).
credit_rules.partial: Gives a contextual example only (e.g. 'gıda') without formal definition, OR uses only one key element.
credit_rules.zero: Empty, tautological ('nesne bir şeydir'), or defines a different concept.

WS1_B1.canonical_answer: Üzerinde çalışılan varlık ya da örnek.

credit_rules.full: Definition captures that özellik is a measurable attribute of the object. Must include ölçülebilir/measurable or nitelik/attribute or similar.
credit_rules.partial: Names an example feature (e.g. 'şeker miktarı') without general definition.

credit_rules.full: Definition captures that etiket is the class/category a nesne belongs to. Must reference sınıf (class) or kategori or the outcome variable.
credit_rules.partial: Gives only the example values ('tavsiye edilir/edilmez') without explaining what etiket is in general.

credit_rules.full: Definition captures that eşik değeri is a numeric boundary that splits a feature into two groups. Must include sınır (boundary), ayıran (separating), or iki grup (two groups).
credit_rules.partial: Gives only a numeric example without explaining the boundary function.

WS1_B4.canonical_answer: Bir özelliği iki gruba ayıran sınır sayısı.

credit_rules.full: Definition captures the if-then structure. Must mention eğer-o zaman or if-then or conditional structure.
credit_rules.partial: Describes a rule in informal language without the conditional structure.
credit_rules.zero: Empty or describes a formula instead of a rule.

WS1_B5.canonical_answer: Eğer-o zaman biçiminde ifade edilen karar cümlesi.

credit_rules.full: Must convey: model predicted positive AND actual is positive. Both components required.
credit_rules.partial: Mentions only one side (model said positive OR actual is positive, not both).
credit_rules.zero: Empty or confuses with FP (false positive).

WS1_B6.canonical_answer: Modelin pozitif olarak tahmin ettiği ve gerçekte de pozitif olan örnekler.

credit_rules.full: Must convey: model predicted positive BUT actual is negative. Both components required.
credit_rules.partial: Mentions only prediction ('model pozitif dedi') without contrasting with actual.
credit_rules.zero: Empty or confuses FP with TP.

WS1_B7.canonical_answer: Modelin pozitif tahmin ettiği ama gerçekte negatif olan örnekler.

credit_rules.full: Formula TP / (TP + FN) stated correctly, or equivalent verbal definition (true positive rate).
credit_rules.partial: Mentions TP and FN but formula incorrectly assembled (e.g. TP/FP, TP/total).
credit_rules.zero: Empty, wrong formula, or confuses with MCR.

credit_rules.partial: Mentions FP, FN, and total but formula assembled incorrectly.
credit_rules.zero: Empty, wrong formula, or uses only FP or only FN.

credit_rules.full: Definition captures the two-sided nature: performs well on training data but poorly on new/test data. Both components required.
credit_rules.partial: Only mentions one side (fits training data well OR can't generalize, not both).
credit_rules.zero: Empty or confuses overfitting with underfitting.

WS1_B10.canonical_answer: Modelin eğitim verisine aşırı uyum sağlaması sonucu yeni verilere genelleyememesi.

credit_rules.full: Definition captures: (1) learns from data and (2) tree structure (dal/yaprak or branches/leaves) or rule-based nature.
credit_rules.partial: Mentions only one of: data learning OR tree structure, not both.
credit_rules.zero: Empty or gives only a visual description without mentioning learning from data.

WS1_B11.canonical_answer: Veriden kural öğrenen, dal ve yaprak düğümlerden oluşan sınıflandırma modeli.

overall_scoring.partial: 5-8 items at full credit, or mix with partials
overall_scoring.zero: Fewer than 5 items attempted or predominantly wrong
